benefits.description: Tiredness from glutathione improved by 5th dose

side_effects.description: Significant tiredness when pinning GHK-Cu and glutathione together or close in time; improved by 5th dose
Irritation at injection site while liquid is dispersing, subq in belly fat

protocol_notes: OP initially pinned GHK-Cu and glutathione (200mg/ml, subQ belly fat) at the same time and experienced tiredness. Switched to pinning at opposite times of day and felt better. Eventually moved GHK-Cu to evening and glutathione to morning. Tiredness improved by the 5th dose.
